description_long: This bird features a slender, elongated body with a long, graduated tail marked by subtle white spots along the edges. Its plumage is primarily a muted brownish-gray, with lighter barring visible on the underparts and wings. The head is smoothly contoured, with a slightly curved, pointed beak that is dark in color. The wings are streamlined and close to the body, giving the bird an aerodynamic profile. The legs are short and not prominently visible, likely gray or dark in color. The overall appearance suggests a bird adapted for agile flight and blending into wooded or urban environments.
description: A slender, brownish-gray bird with a long, spotted tail and subtle barring on its wings and underparts.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's elongated body, long tail with white spots, and streamlined wings.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the graduated tail feathers and the bird's narrow body width.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the long tail and subtle barring on the wings and underparts.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the pointed beak and smooth head profile, with the body tapering towards the tail.
attribute_plumage_pattern: barred underparts with subtle white spots on the tail and uniform brownish-gray upperparts
